zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby於大約1378年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親Sir Hugh Annesley15歲，母親Benedicta de Babington19歲。她於1370年11月25日與Sir Edmund Willoughby在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1415年在她的家鄉享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: Annesely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ansley
meanings: habitational name from such places as Ansley in Warwickshire or Annesley in Nottinghamshire. The former is named with Old English ānsetl ‘hermitage’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’; the latter with an Old English personal name An (‘the solitary one’) + lēah. In North America, the surname may in some cases also be an altered form of Scottish Ainslie . Compare Ainsley .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby was born about 1378, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Hugh Annesley, was 15 and her mother, Benedicta de Babington, was 19. She married Sir Edmund Willoughby on 25 November 1370, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1415, in her hometown, at the age of 39.

Elle a épousé Sir Edmund Willoughby le 25 novembre 1370, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1415, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby(이)가 대략 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Annesley(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Benedicta de Babington(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1370년 11월 25일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Edmund Willoughby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1415년 그녀의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby родилась около 1378 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Annesley было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Benedicta de Babington, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edmund Willoughby 25 ноября 1370 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1415 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 39 лет.
